/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native   CMakeFiles/smart_mirror.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smart_mirror.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smart_mirror.dir/gesture_recognition.cpp.o CMakeFiles/smart_mirror.dir/smart_mirror_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o  -o smart_mirror /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.9.5 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Network.so.5.9.5 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_gapi.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_ml.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_photo.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_stitching.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_video.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.9.5 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.9.5 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.1.1 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.1.1 -lpthread
